characters.name: Squiggle
characters.description: SquiggleBiographical InformationNameUnknownNicknamesSquiggleMy boy (to Kendall)Job TitleMusic producerAffiliatesKendall RoyStatusAliveSeries InformationFirst appearanceDundee My boy (to Kendall) Squiggleis a music producer and DJ. He produced the beat thatKendall Royrapped on duringLogan Roy's 50th anniversary as CEO ofWaystar Royco. Not much is known about him, but he seems to be on good relations with Kendall Roy, as Kendall refers to him as "my boy."
